LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT HUGO DELGADO JR.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 3 (NEGLIGENCE), 5 (NEGLIGENT INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS), AND 10 (PENAL CODE SECTION 528.5). THERE IS NO SEPARATE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS OVERRULED AS TO THE REMAINING CAUSES OF ACTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-02-2012 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT HUGO DELGADO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Off calendar, A dismissal of the entire action was filed on May 15, 2012. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2012 Set For Trial On Jul-23-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2011 Continued To Jan-20-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-10-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ali Ari Aalaei, Esq., from Ari Law, 415-357-3600, for Defendant and moving party

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT HUGO DELGADO JR.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend as to causes of action 3 (negligence), 5 (negligent infliction of emotional distress), and 10 (Penal Code Section 528.5). There is no separate cause of action for negligent infliction of emotional distress Overruled as to the remaining causes of action. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
